name: Acrylic C Shaped Side Table Clear - Room Essentials™
description:
Add modern functionality to your home with this C-Shape Acrylic Table from Room Essentials™. Standing at a height of 24 inches, this C table has a clear acrylic construction and features a rectangular silhouette with a smooth tabletop. Easy to slide underneath your sofa, couch or bed, it makes your snacks, coffee, remotes, phones and books easier to reach while lounging and relaxing. Plus, it can be used as an end table, couch table or bedside table without taking up extra space.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 14 inches
Overall Height: 24 inches
Overall Depth: 14 inches
Overall thickness: 18mm
